description: Canonical first production direction-aware dataset contract. Limited to supported named in-plane modes and narrow named-mode-centered spread under a frozen forward metadata family.

forward_metadata.formal_baseline_selection_rule: temperature sweep RMFT pairing data, charge-balanced p≈0 branch, temperature_eV <= 1.0e-3, first 8 samples sorted by temperature
